response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and deep cloud-native AI deployment track record required for this staff-level role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Active open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Limited evidence of enterprise-grade GenAI production deployments over 8+ years
Lacks demonstrable experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
